allow: Bash(yabai -m query --windows | jq '[.[] | select\(.app == "ghostty"\) | {id, app, space, display, "is-floating", "is-visible", "is-hidden", "is-minimized"}]' 2>&1)
Bash(yabai -m rule --list 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || yabai -m rule --list 2>/dev/null)

Bash(yabai -m query --windows | python3 -c "
import json, sys
windows = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for w in windows:
    if 'Calendar' in w.get\('app', ''\):
        print\(json.dumps\({k: w[k] for k in ['id','app','title','is-sticky','is-floating','is-visible','space']}, indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)
